name: Screenshot Capture
description: Captures the screen and saves it to the desktop with a timestamp
author: AgentOS

steps.description: Capture screen and save to desktop
steps.command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $path = "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\screenshot_$ts.png"; [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen | ForEach-Object { $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap($_.Bounds.Width, $_.Bounds.Height); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bmp); $g.CopyFromScreen($_.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $_.Bounds.Size); $bmp.Save($path) }; Write-Output "Saved to $path"
